metadata.description: Plugins that help Bark AI users get more out of Bark inside Claude Web, Claude Cowork, and Claude Code.

plugins.name: bark-cowork
plugins.description: The Bark AI toolkit for Claude Cowork — connect your store's Bark data and build branded, interactive artifacts, starting with live dashboards.

plugins.name: bark-claude-code
plugins.description: The Bark AI toolkit for Claude Code — connect your store's Bark data and build live, deployable dashboards you host yourself on any static web host.
